hooks.command: file_path="$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$file_path" ] && echo "$file_path" | grep -qE '\.swift$'; then echo '[swift-build-check] Swift file changed — queue build verification'; fi
file_path="$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$file_path" ] && echo "$file_path" | grep -qE '\.(p8|p12|key|pem|cer)$'; then echo 'BLOCK: Refusing to modify credential/signing file'; exit 2; fi
